title: N8N SMS Filter Unknown Contacts Workflow
description: A ready-to-use n8n workflow template that filters incoming calls to identify unknown/unsaved contacts and sends SMS notifications only to numbers not in Google Contacts, eliminating manual exclusion lists.
gumroad_description:
You're tired of manually managing exclusion lists just to stop spamming your own saved contacts with automated SMS.

---

Who this is for:
— Freelancers and consultants screening inbound calls without a receptionist
— Small business owners running SMS campaigns who need smarter filtering
— n8n builders who want a real-world workflow they can ship immediately

---

What's inside:
— A 9-node n8n workflow that cross-references incoming numbers against Google Contacts in real time
— Importable JSON — drop it into your instance and it works
— A setup guide that walks you through credentials, node config, and testing so you're not guessing

---

No more maintaining a manual blocklist. No more accidental texts to people already in your phone. The logic is built in — Google Contacts is your source of truth, and the workflow handles the rest automatically.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
